name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy for GitHub Copilot CLI — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, and in-app feedback. Bundles the eight area skills and the shipeasy MCP server. Points skills at the SAME ./skills/ the Claude Code and Codex plugins ship; uses a Copilot-shaped MCP file (type: local) since Copilot requires it. All CRUD is delegated to the shipeasy MCP server or CLI.
